brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with US-Iran strikes in the Gulf, while UK political scandals and AI security concerns dominate headlines. Research highlights advances in AI-assisted game worlds and prompt engineering.
news_summary: Oil prices jump after renewed Gulf strikes risk shipping; Farage faces money laundering questions; hackers exploit AI tools to form botnets.
papers_summary: New papers introduce AlayaWorld for long-horizon video game generation and Prompt Coach for teaching prompt engineering, alongside visualization frameworks for Chinese painting and weather models.
